name: Lasagna Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the Italian sausage into a 15-ounce casserole dish.
2. Stir in onion.
3. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 2 to 3 minutes or till sausage is done and onion is tender. Drain off fat.
4. Stir in beaten egg yolk, cream-style cottage cheese, and grated parmesan cheese.
5. Spread each lasagna noodle with half of the meat mixture.
6. Roll up jelly-roll style, starting at short edge. Place, seam side down, in a small greased baking dish.
7. Stir together the pizza sauce and water or dry red wine.
8. Pour over the lasagna rolls in the baking dish.
9. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 2 to 3 minutes or till the lasagna roll are heated through.
10. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese atop the lasgna rolls.
11. Micro-cook, uncovered, about 30 seconds more or till the cheese is just melted.
